title: tragacantha longior
intro: Tragacantha longior, also known as the long-spined hairgrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as treating respiratory issues and digestive problems. Tragacantha longior is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
